title: Watching a Neural Network Become Universal
tagline: Build any function by stacking simple bumps
summary: Slide neurons in and out of a tiny network and watch it approximate a target curve live. Train an actual MLP in the browser to feel why one hidden layer can match any shape.
highlights: Start with a single ReLU neuron and watch its shape, then see how two neurons subtract to make a bump.
Drag the width slider to add more hidden neurons and watch the fit snap to any of five target shapes.
Train an actual MLP in your browser on sine, step, spike, or zigzag targets and see the loss curve in real time.
